title: Deep Research Tools Comparison: A Side-by-Side Evaluation of AI Platforms
description:
Google Gemini — Google’s AI search platform offers smart summarization and source attribution directly in the text. It includes a free plan with Deep Research capabilities.
 ChatGPT (OpenAI) — We tested the Pro version (GPT-4). While it provides excellent reasoning and depth, Deep Research mode is only available for paid users.
 Mistral — An open-source tool that’s becoming popular for free, particularly in technical fields.
 Perplexity.ai — Known for speed and clarity, offering Deep Research even on the free plan, with structured answers and transparent sourcing.
 Jina AI Search — A free, open-source search engine tailored for deep, customizable research. It provides reference-heavy outputs but can be more technical. [...] Jina AI delivers the most detailed results, scanning over 100 docu
